name: Adaptative Governance
description: Adaptive governance overlay — observes agent behavior, detects improvement opportunities, runs bounded experiments, and asks for approval before structural changes

overlayMode.description: Governance overlay mode on first startup

autoObserve.description: Automatically observe agent messages and tool results

journalPath.description: Path to the governance audit journal directory (relative to agent workspace or absolute)

agents.description: List of agent IDs governed by this plugin. Empty array = all agents. Use /governance onboard to configure per-agent mode.
